subject: Bald compact fighter in orange gi in a braced fighting stance
description: A short, stocky bald fighter in an orange martial arts gi stands in a braced, wide-legged fighting stance. The figure is compact and muscular, planted firmly as if absorbing a blow or preparing to deliver one. There are motion or energy effects in the background suggesting an active tournament arena. The posture communicates resilience and determination.
foreground: Short bald fighter in orange gi in wide fighting stance
